[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 7/22 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Himari, 3★ Eimi (Swimsuit), 3★ Hare (Camp), 3★ Kotama (Camp)
